title: cincinalis rugulosa
intro: Cincinalis rugulosa, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or Chinchomame, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cincinalis rugulosa include relief from pain, inflammation, and muscle spasms, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Cincinalis rugulosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and muscle strain.
